mapper.insert: INSERT INTO certification_posts( user_id, challenge_participant_id, contents, certification_image, certification_image_url ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{challengeParticipantId}, #{contents}, '테스트', -- TODO: 이미지는 아직 임시. 다음 단계(S3)에서 실제 파일명 교체 #{thumbnailImage} -- TODO: 실제 URL로 교체 )
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.status, c.host_id, c.cert_start_time, c.cert_end_time FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE p.id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certification_posts WHERE challenge_participant_id = #{challengeParticipantId} AND created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO certification_post_images (post_id, stored_filename, image_url, sort_order) VALUES
(#{postId}, '임시', #{url}, #{i})
mapper.select: SELECT id AS post_id, user_id AS author_id, contents, certification_image_url AS thumbnail_url, certification_status AS status, like_count, comment_count, created_at FROM certification_posts WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT image_url FROM certification_post_images WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT user_id FROM certification_posts WHERE id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND role = 'ADMIN' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE certification_posts SET deleted_at = now() WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.certification_status AS status, p.user_id AS author_id, c.host_id AS host_id FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE certification_posts SET certification_status = 'REJECTED', rejection_reason = #{reason}, rejected_at = now() WHERE id = #{postId} AND certification_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS post_id, p.user_id AS author_id, p.certification_image_url AS thumbnail_url, p.contents, p.created_at FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id WHERE cp.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND p.certification_status = 'PENDING' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE certification_posts SET contents = #{contents}, certification_image_url = #{thumbnailImage}, certification_status = 'PENDING', rejection_reason = NULL, rejected_at = NULL, approval_type = NULL WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS certification_id, c.id AS challenge_id, c.title AS challenge_title, p.user_id AS author_id, u.nickname AS author_nickname, p.certification_image_url AS thumbnail_url, p.created_at AS certified_at FROM certification_posts p JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.id = p.challenge_participant_id JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id IN
#{postId}
